response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content: It's a contributor list screen followed by a concert stage view. 2. Identified the song from lyrics transcribed from the audio: 'SLOW MOTION' (Japanese: SLOW MOTION). 3. Verified original artist (Nao Toyama) and confirmed the performer (Tokino Sora) is performing a cover. 4. Searched for the official lyrics of Nao Toyama's 'SLOW MOTION' and confirmed they match the video. 5. Mapped the scenes based on the visual transition at 03:47. 6. Populated the JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video is a concert stream ending screen, featuring a list of contributors, followed by a live performance of the song 'SLOW MOTION' by Tokino Sora, which was originally performed by Nao Toyama.

scenes.description: A scrolling list of contributor names for a Tokino Sora stream. The song 'SLOW MOTION' plays in the background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
それは一瞬の目眩のようで
ひどくまぶしい風だった
薄く汗ばむ夕闇の中を
滑るみたいに抜けだせば 遠く
私たちは どこまで行けるだろう
終わらない波音はきらめきながら囁(ささや)く
透明な海の底
生まれては消えてく
泡がくり返し果てしなく
祈り 届けてゆく
追いかけて 追いかけて
君とならこのまま
夜になるまえに
今という 永遠を知りたいだけ
そして灼けつく幻のあとに
優しい孤独が残るなら
明日より 触(さわ)れない未来より
記憶さえ持たずに 輝きだけ 纏(まと)って
運命の息づかい
すれちがう偶然
2つの呼吸を重ねて
奇跡 描いてゆく
泳いでも 泳いでも
辿り着けない場所
求め合えたなら
ためらいも すべて溶けてゆくでしょう
何もかもが溢れて みちびいてゆけるなら
何もかもを抱きしめ 変わりつづけてゆくことを
怖れないで
透明な海の底
生まれては消えてく
泡がくり返し果てしなく
祈り 届けてゆく
君となら このまま
夜になるまえに
今という 永遠を知りたいから
それは一瞬の目眩のようで
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It was like a momentary dizziness
A dazzlingly bright wind
If we slip through the slightly sweaty twilight, far away
How far can we go?
The endless sound of waves whispers while shimmering
Deep in the transparent sea
Bubbles are born and disappear endlessly
Delivering our prayers
Chasing, chasing
If I'm with you like this
Before it becomes night
I just want to know the eternity called 'now'
And after the burning illusion
If a gentle loneliness remains
Rather than tomorrow, rather than a future I can't touch
Even without memories, just wrapped in radiance
The breath of fate
Coincidences passing by
Overlapping our two breaths
Drawing miracles
Even if I swim, even if I swim
A place I can't reach
If we could seek each other
Hesitation would also melt away, I'm sure
If everything overflows and we can be guided
Without fearing that everything will change while embracing it
Deep in the transparent sea
Bubbles are born and disappear endlessly
Delivering our prayers
If I'm with you like this
Before it becomes night
Because I want to know the eternity called 'now'
It was like a momentary dizziness

scenes.description: The screen transitions to a concert stage showing light sticks in the audience. Tokino Sora continues her performance of 'SLOW MOTION'.

scenes.description: The scrolling contributor list is displayed throughout the video while the song plays in the background. The song is identified as 'SLOW MOTION' originally by Nao Toyama, covered by Tokino Sora. Lyrics were found via search. The second scene captures the transition to the concert stage view. Both scenes feature the same performance of the song.
